title: Pleasantly Chewy Croatian Fennel Frittata
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Croatian dish featuring fennel bulb, this frittata is perfect for a brunch mood, with umami and chewy textures from the fennel and cheese. The brine-wet fennel adds a unique twist to this classic dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the sliced fennel until it is tender and lightly browned.
In a greased 9 inch pie plate, arrange the cooked fennel in the bottom of the plate.
Pour the egg mixture over the fennel and smooth the top.
Bake the frittata in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the frittata from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve the frittata warm, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
